raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Over 100 billion gallons of untreated toxic wastewater has crossed the California border since December 2018.",

    "The South San Diego coastline has been closed for recreational beach access since December 8, 2021, due to an ongoing environmental disaster.",
    "A study by the Scripps Institution of Oceanography identified 34,000 illnesses per year in the surrounding area could be attributed to contamination.",
    "A more recent study linked 76% of bacteria in Imperial Beach air to coastal water pollution.",
```
